name: Git Diff Analysis
description: Analyze a git diff for a repository, reporting files changed, insertions, deletions, and a human-readable summary of what changed.

compareRef.description: Git ref to compare against (default: HEAD~1)

assumptions: git is installed and available in PATH
The specified path is a valid git repository
The compare ref exists in the repository history

implementation.code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Parse inputs from SKILL_INPUTS env var
REPO_PATH=$(echo "$SKILL_INPUTS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('repoPath',''))")
COMPARE_REF=$(echo "$SKILL_INPUTS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('compareRef','HEAD~1'))")

if [ -z "$REPO_PATH" ]; then
    echo '{"filesChanged":0,"insertions":0,"deletions":0,"summary":"Error: no repoPath provided"}'
    exit 0
fi

if [ ! -d "$REPO_PATH/.git" ] && ! git -C "$REPO_PATH" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo '{"filesChanged":0,"insertions":0,"deletions":0,"summary":"Error: not a git repository"}'
    exit 0
fi

cd "$REPO_PATH"

# Verify compare ref exists
if ! git rev-parse --verify "$COMPARE_REF" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "{\"filesChanged\":0,\"insertions\":0,\"deletions\":0,\"summary\":\"Error: ref '$COMPARE_REF' not found\"}"
    exit 0
fi

# Get diff stats
STAT_OUTPUT=$(git diff --stat "$COMPARE_REF" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
SHORTSTAT=$(git diff --shortstat "$COMPARE_REF" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

# Parse shortstat: " 5 files changed, 120 insertions(+), 30 deletions(-)"
FILES_CHANGED=0
INSERTIONS=0
DELETIONS=0

if [ -n "$SHORTSTAT" ]; then
    FILES_CHANGED=$(echo "$SHORTSTAT" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ file' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo 0)
    INSERTIONS=$(echo "$SHORTSTAT" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ insertion' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo 0)
    DELETIONS=$(echo "$SHORTSTAT" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ deletion' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo 0)
fi

# Handle empty values
FILES_CHANGED=${FILES_CHANGED:-0}
INSERTIONS=${INSERTIONS:-0}
DELETIONS=${DELETIONS:-0}

# Build file-level summary
FILE_SUMMARY=$(git diff --stat --stat-width=80 "$COMPARE_REF" 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "(no changes)")

# Get changed file types
FILE_TYPES=$(git diff --name-only "$COMPARE_REF" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -5 | awk '{printf "%s (%s), ", $2, $1}' || echo "")
FILE_TYPES=${FILE_TYPES%, }

# Build summary text
SUMMARY="Compared against ${COMPARE_REF}: ${FILES_CHANGED} files changed (+${INSERTIONS}/-${DELETIONS} lines)."
if [ -n "$FILE_TYPES" ]; then
    SUMMARY="${SUMMARY} File types: ${FILE_TYPES}."
fi
SUMMARY="${SUMMARY}\n\nDetails:\n${FILE_SUMMARY}"

# Output JSON using Python to handle escaping correctly
python3 -c "
import json, sys
print(json.dumps({
    'filesChanged': int('${FILES_CHANGED}' or 0),
    'insertions': int('${INSERTIONS}' or 0),
    'deletions': int('${DELETIONS}' or 0),
    'summary': '''${SUMMARY}'''.replace('\\n', '\n')
}))
"
